tasks.title: Each task object in STATE.json has a ticks field that increments on every agent dispatch
A replacement task created by replan starts with ticks equal to replaced task ticks + 1
agt-harness transition rejects in-progress for task at or above maxTaskTicks
maxTaskTicks is configurable via TASK_MAX_TICKS env var (default: 6)
transition.mjs detects repeating pattern of length K >= 2 in transitionHistory
On 3rd repetition of same oscillation pattern, harness exits non-zero
progress.md contains timestamped entry whenever tick limit or oscillation halt fires
Unit tests pass for tick increment, replan inheritance, tick-limit rejection, oscillation detection
Manual smoke test with mock task that always fails confirms run terminates cleanly
